zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bodrugan於1279年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 恩德利時，她的父親Henry de Bodrugan16歲，母親Sybil de Mandeville15歲。她於1311年與Henry Champernon在英國戴文可利斯特 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年10月24日在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bodrugan于1279年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利时，她的父亲Henry de Bodrugan16岁，母亲Sybil de Mandeville15岁。她于1311年与Henry Champernon在英国戴文可利斯特 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年10月24日在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bodrugan was born in 1279, in St Endellion, Cornwall, England, her father, Henry de Bodrugan, was 16 and her mother, Sybil de Mandeville, was 15. She married Henry Champernon in 1311, in Clyst St Mary, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 October 1331, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, at the age of 52.

Elle a épousé Henry Champernon en 1311, à Clyst St Mary, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1331, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bodruganが1279年にイギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオンで生まれた時，父Henry de Bodruganは16歳，母Sybil de Mandevilleは15歳であった。1311年にイギリスデボンクリスト スト マリーでHenry Champernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年10月24日にイギリスデボンバーンスタプルで52歳で死去した。

ko.Of, Clist Champernon, Devonshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클리스트 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bodrugan(이)가 1279년 영국 코른월 스트 엔들리언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Bodrugan(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Mandeville(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1311년 영국 데폰 클리스트 스트 메리에서 Henry Champernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 10월 24일 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Champernon em 1311, em Clyst St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1331, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.Of, Clist Champernon, Devonshire, Englan: клист ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bodrugan родилась в 1279 г. в местности ст энделлион, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Bodrugan было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Mandeville, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Champernon в 1311 г. в местности клист ст мэри, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1331 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Henry Champernon en 1311, en Clyst St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1331, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
